_doc: Maps each body file to its Shopify notification admin name, page-level title/badge/preheader, and the Shopify admin-path segment used in /email_templates/<adminPath>/edit. Body files live in scripts/shopify-templates/bodies/<key>.html. Generated templates land in scripts/shopify-templates/out/<key>.html.

templates.title: Welcome to OpenDrone
templates.preheader: Thanks for signing up. Monthly product releases and build notes from the bench.

templates.title: Confirm your subscription
templates.preheader: One click to confirm your Engineering Essentials subscription.

templates.title: Order confirmation
templates.preheader: We've received your order. Details inside.

templates.emailSubject: Order {{ name }} is on its way
templates.title: Your OpenDrone order has shipped
templates.preheader: Your OpenDrone order is on its way. Tracking inside.

templates.title: Order canceled
templates.preheader: Your OpenDrone order was canceled. Any charge will be refunded.

templates.title: Refund processed
templates.preheader: Your OpenDrone refund has been processed.

templates.title: Finish your order
templates.preheader: Your OpenDrone cart is still here. Pick up where you left off.

templates.title: Reset your password
templates.preheader: One-click password reset for your OpenDrone account.

templates.title: Activate your account
templates.preheader: Activate your OpenDrone account for faster checkout.

templates.title: Return created
templates.preheader: Your return has been created. Shipping label and instructions inside.

templates.title: Return request received
templates.preheader: We've got your return request. We'll be in touch shortly.

templates.title: Return approved
templates.preheader: Your return request is approved. Next steps inside.

templates.title: Return request declined
templates.preheader: Update on your recent return request.

templates.emailSubject: Payment issue with your OpenDrone order
templates.title: Payment couldn't be processed
templates.preheader: We couldn't process your payment. Try again to complete your order.

templates.title: Payment issue
templates.preheader: We couldn't process your pending payment.

templates.title: Payment received
templates.preheader: Your pending payment has been processed successfully.

templates.title: Your invoice
templates.preheader: Here is your invoice. Pay below to complete the order.

templates.title: Outstanding balance
templates.preheader: Your order has an outstanding balance.

templates.title: Your order was updated
templates.preheader: Your OpenDrone order has been edited.

templates.title: Access your order
templates.preheader: Fresh link to view your order status.

templates.title: Shipping update
templates.preheader: Updated tracking for your OpenDrone order.

templates.emailSubject: Your OpenDrone order is out for delivery
templates.title: Out for delivery
templates.preheader: Your OpenDrone order is out for delivery today.

templates.emailSubject: Your OpenDrone order has been delivered
templates.title: Delivered
templates.preheader: Your OpenDrone order has been delivered. Happy flying.

templates.title: Payment reminder
templates.preheader: Reminder that a payment on your OpenDrone order is due.

templates.title: Payment receipt
templates.preheader: Receipt for your OpenDrone payment.

templates.title: From OpenDrone
templates.preheader: A message from the OpenDrone team.

templates.title: Confirm your new email
templates.preheader: Confirm the email change on your OpenDrone account.
